title: Lesson 2a: Run a Coding AI on Your Laptop

chapters.title: Intro — three things you'll have working
Why local? Privacy, cost, demystify the stack
The stack: llama.cpp server + OpenAI API + Cline
Start the model server (Qwen2.5 Coder Q4_KM)
Configure Cline in VS Code / Cursor
Live demo — local coding agent in action
